title: ClearConfirm
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ec34a782641a34e3da21e38f84ff7a4692a5734.png)

### Features:

- Stops you and your admins from accidentally clearing the inventories of players.
- Asks staff to use the command "/clearconfirm" to confirm their intentions.
- Really, really simple!
  
### Commands/Permissions

Commands:

`/clearconfirm` - Use this after running "/clear" to confirm that you want to clear an inventory.

Permissions:

`minecraft.command.clear` - The only permission used. Allows the user to use /clearconfirm.
